name: Booz Allen Hamilton Holding Corp
business: Booz Allen is an advanced technology company building products and solutions for government and business, primarily serving U.S. federal government customers including national security, defense, intelligence, civil agencies, and some commercial clients.
namedCustomers: Office of the Secretary of Defense

exposures.sentence: As the federal government's largest AI provider with approximately 400 active AI projects, we build secure AI solutions and advanced capabilities spanning agentic AI, physical AI, and AI-Radio Access Network (AI-RAN), and other emerging technologies designed for mission critical environments.

We also have one of the most impactful cyber businesses globally, protecting U.S. federal, defense, and intelligence agencies, as well as private sector customers, including Fortune 500 and Global 1,000 companies.

We build secure AI-enabled defense tech products from first prototype to mission deployment in our three flagship engineering facilities, where we build mission-ready technology today, not years from now.

We develop, scale and deploy advanced capabilities across established and emerging technology domains, including AI, cyber, edge, autonomy, space, and quantum, for our customers most critical missions.

catalysts.sentence: Booz Allen achieved a Final C3PAO (CMMC Third Party Assessment Organization) CMMC Level 2 Certification in October 2025 which is valid for 3 years with a mandated annual attestation of compliance from the CISO.
acquisition of Defy Security, which closed in the first quarter of fiscal 2027
We plan to relocate our headquarters in the fall of 2027 to Reston,Virginia, dependent upon the timing of the completion of various tenant improvements.
